message:
test(smoke): pubsub multi-client live-diff vs vendored Redis oracle

Adds end-to-end live-diff coverage for multi-client pub/sub scenarios
against a real vendored Redis oracle, reusing the new
`run_live_redis_multi_client_diff` harness entrypoint.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * New import: `run_live_redis_multi_client_diff` alongside the
    existing `run_live_redis_diff` / `run_live_redis_diff_for_cases`
    import block.
  * New `#[test] fn core_pubsub_multi_client_live_redis_matches_runtime`:
    spins up a `VendoredRedisOracle`, constructs a `LiveOracleConfig`
    pointed at the oracle port, and runs the
    `core_pubsub_multi_client.json` fixture through
    `run_live_redis_multi_client_diff`. Asserts `report.failed.is_empty()`
    — i.e. every case in the fixture matched the oracle's behavior
    exactly. This is the first live-diff test in the smoke suite that
    exercises the multi-client harness (previous tests were
    single-client).

No production code change in this commit; smoke tests only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
